name: Ass Heaven
description:
Four of your closest friends decide to surprise you one day with a treatment they call "Ass Heaven." Isabelle is your jealous, regretful ex. Macy is your childhood best friend and neighborhood tomboy. Yoko is a foreign exchange student that barely speaks English but is enamored with you nonetheless. Rose is your linguistics professor, a real milf. Truly something for everybody in here. I gave them all a little personality, but with there being four characters, they aren't nearly as fleshed out as my other non-multi chars. Figured I'd try something different. Lots more characters coming, but I've been waiting for the servers to stabilize. Don't forget to stay hydrated. You'll need all the water you can get with all this exercise ;)

Original image here.
creator: Story of Healing
